props.text: US govt bans Anthropic Fable 5 / Mythos 5 for non-US nationals → VVV, Venice rally on decentralized-AI thesis
SpaceX IPO instantly tokenized on Solana via Backpack/Ondo; $SPCX perps led Hyperliquid volume
SpaceX IPO +20% to $2T — vol compression, flows into growth names, broader risk-on
Iran peace deal hopes → oil at multi-month lows, yields easing, cyclicals leading
Coinbase $4.4B USDC moved to Hyperliquid + Securitize $250M tokenized CLO on Solana — institutional-scale onchain routing
TCG gacha (Collector Crypt, Beezie) eyeing $HYPE-style buyback fee model
BTC extreme fear (index 12) dropped from feed entirely — gone

AI censorship is the new macro→crypto feed. Banning Anthropic for non-US nationals legitimizes VVV/Venice's thesis — suppression is the demand catalyst, rally amplifies the narrative, rinse. Meanwhile: SpaceX at $2T + Coinbase $4.4B + Securitize $250M all landing on Solana the same week. Macro risk-on opened the window; institutional flows walked through it. BTC fear index is gone from the feed — the lag from last run may have cleared.
